# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class ProductSearchController extends Controller
{
    /**
     * Search products by name, category, and price range.
     *
     * @param  \Illuminate\Http\Request  $request
     * @return \Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse
     */
    public function search(Request $request)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'name'         => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'category'     => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'category_id'  => 'nullable|integer|exists:categories,id',
            'min_price'    => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'max_price'    => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'sort_by'      => 'nullable|in:name,price,created_at,relevance',
            'sort_order'   => 'nullable|in:asc,desc',
            'per_page'     => 'nullable|integer|min:1|max:100',
        ]);

        $name       = $validated['name'] ?? null;
        $category   = $validated['category'] ?? null;
        $categoryId = $validated['category_id'] ?? null;
        $minPrice   = $validated['min_price'] ?? null;
        $maxPrice   = $validated['max_price'] ?? null;
        $sortBy     = $validated['sort_by'] ?? 'relevance';
        $sortOrder  = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 'desc';
        $perPage    = $validated['per_page'] ?? 20;

        $bindings = [];
        $conditions = [];
        $selectFields = [
            'p.id',
            'p.name',
            'p.description',
            'p.price',
            'p.image_url',
            'p.stock_quantity',
            'p.created_at',
            'c.id AS category_id',
            'c.name AS category_name',
        ];

        // Build a relevance score when searching by name
        if ($name) {
            $selectFields[] = DB::raw("
                (
                    CASE
                        WHEN LOWER(p.name) = LOWER(?) THEN 100
                        WHEN LOWER(p.name) LIKE LOWER(?) THEN 75
                        WHEN LOWER(p.name) LIKE LOWER(?) THEN 50
                        ELSE 0
                    END
                    +
                    CASE
                        WHEN LOWER(p.description) LIKE LOWER(?) THEN 25
                        ELSE 0
                    END
                ) AS relevance_score
            ");
            // Bindings for relevance score: exact, starts with, contains (name), contains (description)
            $bindings[] = $name;
            $bindings[] = $name . '%';
            $bindings[] = '%' . $name . '%';
            $bindings[] = '%' . $name . '%';

            // Filter: at least partial match on name or description
            $conditions[] = '(LOWER(p.name) LIKE LOWER(?) OR LOWER(p.description) LIKE LOWER(?))';
            $bindings[] = '%' . $name . '%';
            $bindings[] = '%' . $name . '%';
        } else {
            $selectFields[] = DB::raw('0 AS relevance_score');
        }

        // Category filter by ID
        if ($categoryId) {
            // Include subcategories via recursive CTE if supported, otherwise direct match
            $conditions[] = '(c.id = ? OR c.parent_id = ?)';
            $bindings[] = $categoryId;
            $bindings[] = $categoryId;
        }

        // Category filter by name
        if ($category && !$categoryId) {
            $conditions[] = 'LOWER(c.name) LIKE LOWER(?)';
            $bindings[] = '%' . $category . '%';
        }

        // Price range filters
        if ($minPrice !== null) {
            $conditions[] = 'p.price >= ?';
            $bindings[] = $minPrice;
        }

        if ($maxPrice !== null) {
            $conditions[] = 'p.price <= ?';
            $bindings[] = $maxPrice;
        }

        // Only active/visible products
        $conditions[] = 'p.is_active = 1';

        $whereClause = count($conditions) > 0
            ? 'WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions)
            : '';

        // Determine ORDER BY clause
        switch ($sortBy) {
            case 'name':
                $orderClause = "ORDER BY p.name {$sortOrder}";
                break;
            case 'price':
                $orderClause = "ORDER BY p.price {$sortOrder}";
                break;
            case 'created_at':
                $orderClause = "ORDER BY p.created_at {$sortOrder}";
                break;
            case 'relevance':
            default:
                $orderClause = $name
                    ? "ORDER BY relevance_score DESC, p.name ASC"
                    : "ORDER BY p.created_at DESC";
                break;
        }

        $selectFieldsStr = implode(', ', array_map(function ($field) {
            return $field instanceof \Illuminate\Database\Query\Expression
                ? $field->getValue(DB::connection()->getQueryGrammar())
                : $field;
        }, $selectFields));

        $sql = "
            SELECT {$selectFieldsStr}
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
            {$whereClause}
            {$orderClause}
        ";

        // Use a manual paginator for raw queries
        $page = $request->input('page', 1);
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $perPage;

        // Get total count
        $countSql = "
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
            {$whereClause}
        ";

        // Bindings for count query (same conditions, but without relevance score bindings)
        $countBindings = [];
        $bindingIndex = 0;

        // Skip the relevance score bindings (first 4 if name is set) for count query
        if ($name) {
            // Relevance score uses 4 bindings; skip them for count
            $countBindings = array_slice($bindings, 4);
        } else {
            $countBindings = $bindings;
        }

        $totalResult = DB::selectOne($countSql, $countBindings);
        $total = $totalResult->total ?? 0;

        // Append LIMIT/OFFSET to main query
        $sql .= " LIMIT ? OFFSET ?";
        $bindings[] = (int) $perPage;
        $bindings[] = (int) $offset;

        $results = DB::select($sql, $bindings);

        // Build paginator response
        $lastPage = (int) ceil($total / $perPage);

        // Fetch aggregations for faceted search
        $aggregationBindings = $name
            ? array_slice($bindings, 4, -2) // skip relevance bindings and limit/offset
            : array_slice($bindings, 0, -2); // skip limit/offset

        $priceAggSql = "
            SELECT
                MIN(p.price) AS min_price,
                MAX(p.price) AS max_price,
                AVG(p.price) AS avg_price
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
            {$whereClause}
        ";

        $priceAgg = DB::selectOne($priceAggSql, $aggregationBindings);

        $categoryAggSql = "
            SELECT
                c.id AS category_id,
                c.name AS category_name,
                COUNT(p.id) AS product_count
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
            {$whereClause}
            GROUP BY c.id, c.name
            ORDER BY product_count DESC
            LIMIT 20
        ";

        $categoryAgg = DB::select($categoryAggSql, $aggregationBindings);

        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'data'    => [
                'products'   => $results,
                'pagination' => [
                    'current_page' => (int) $page,
                    'last_page'    => $lastPage,
                    'per_page'     => (int) $perPage,
                    'total'        => (int) $total,
                    'from'         => $total > 0 ? $offset + 1 : null,
                    'to'           => $total > 0 ? min($offset + $perPage, $total) : null,
                ],
                'aggregations' => [
                    'price_range' => [
                        'min' => $priceAgg->min_price ?? 0,
                        'max' => $priceAgg->max_price ?? 0,
                        'avg' => round($priceAgg->avg_price ?? 0, 2),
                    ],
                    'categories' => $categoryAgg,
                ],
            ],
            'filters_applied' => array_filter([
                'name'        => $name,
                'category'    => $category,
                'category_id' => $categoryId,
                'min_price'   => $minPrice,
                'max_price'   => $maxPrice,
                'sort_by'     => $sortBy,
                'sort_order'  => $sortOrder,
            ], fn($v) => $v !== null),
        ]);
    }
}
